name: management
description: Product and project management discipline for the NVZver marketplace. Two agents: (1) product-manager — shapes vague ideas into structured pitches via interactive conversation; (2) project-manager — stewards the roadmap, recommends what to build next with dependency/risk/value reasoning, decomposes pitches into focused epics, and hands each epic to LSA. Entry points: management:start-feature (shaping) and management:roadmap (project management). Depends on core (ground-rules, output).
